title: GuildsCore
body:
Hi, I lost interest in spigot plugins completely. Do not expect updates.

# About

GuildsCore is a plugin that will make guilds on your server even better! Each guild has their own heart that protects their base and can be upgraded, letting guilds build good-looking bases, while still keeping the guild-survival gameplay style.

# Features
 - Nickname decoration - prefixes, suffixes, color
 - Customising menus - icon
 - Guild chat
 - Guild compass (points to selected guild's heart)
 - Guild bank - custom economy!
 - Built-in TPA with guild cost
 - TabList header/footer configuration
 - All messages configurable in config.yml using MiniMessage!

# Plugin compatibility

Compatibility with other plugins is limited. Known issues:
 - NoChatReports breaks nametags in chat - use FreedomChat instead
 - SimpleTPA/Essentials may create command conflict

# Things I'm still working on
 - Making config more user-friendly
 - Finishing TPA
 - Creating an API
 - Permissions

Translations: https://gist.github.com/goteusz-maszyk/05d841d30a8237a34050cd8e0646778e
